name: ruby-protocol-hpack
title: ruby-protocol-hpack
summary: compresssor and decompressor for HTTP 2.0 HPACK
description:
compresssor and decompressor for HTTP 2.0 HPACK
Protocol::HPACK provides a compressor and decompressor for HTTP 2.0
headers, HPACK, as defined by RFC7541.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-protocol-hpack because compresssor and decompressor for HTTP 2.0 HPACK.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-protocol-hpack as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-protocol-hpack with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-protocol-hpack --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
